title: poa clelandii
intro: Poa clelandii, also known as Blue Grass or Native Blue Grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia, particularly in the eastern regions. This plant is traditionally used by the Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa clelandii include its ability to soothe sore muscles and joints, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Poa clelandii are often made into a tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
